difficulty.description: Scramble difficulty label (v2 generated datasets): an upper bound on the strict-AC solution length.

ac_trivial.description: True if known AC-trivial, False if known non-trivial, null if open/unknown.

minimal_known_operations.description: Fewest strict primitive AC operations of any known trivialization, or null if none is known.

optimal.description: Whether minimal_known_operations is proven minimal; null when there is no number to qualify.
